title: anthemis rigida subsp. liguliflora
intro: Anthemis rigida subsp. liguliflora, also known as Alpine Yarrow or Ligule-flowered Yarrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family native to the European Alps. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. Anthemis rigida subsp. liguliflora is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
